DESCRIPTION: Switching_main.m exists at fixed relative path under repo (Switching ver12/main).
Legacy file contains a line matching regexp dir\s*=\s*"([^"]+)" with a usable absolute parent path.
Parsed parentDir exists and is readable on the execution host.
At least one immediate subfolder name starts with "Temp Dep" (case-insensitive); other dependence folders (e.g. Amp Dep) are ignored by canonical script.
Each used folder yields finite meta.Current_mA from folder name token (see getFileListSwitching); canonical errors if missing.
File names and dep_type (from extract_dep_type_from_folder) allow sorting regex in getFileListSwitching for Temperature sweeps.
processFilesSwitching expects importdata-readable .dat with numeric matrix; column 1 = time; LI channels in columns 5,7,9,11 when non-NaN.
analyzeSwitchingStability returns global switching channel in {1,2,3,4} with nonempty tableData.chN for that channel.
After filtering, some (T_K, current) samples exist; grid non-empty for temps and currents.
CSV includes columns: pair, phi_shape_corr, kappa_corr, abs_kappa_corr, kappa_sign, PHI_PAIR_STABLE, KAPPA_PAIR_STABLE, KAPPA_SIGN_STATUS; pair format includes " vs " for filtering.
Canonical variant filter uses literal names xy_over_xx and baseline_aware in pair strings.
No semantic dependency: file is read but variable status_table is never used.
